abilities.confidenceReason: Existing local data preserved; official Pokémon Champions confirmation still required before treating as verified.

abilities.name: Technician
abilities.effect: Powers up the Pokémon’s weaker moves.
abilities.confidenceReason: Existing local data preserved; official Pokémon Champions confirmation still required before treating as verified.

abilities.name: Telepathy
abilities.effect: Anticipates an ally’s attack and dodges it.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.effect: Heat-and-cold protection.

abilities.name: Torrent

abilities.name: Tough Claws

abilities.name: Toxic Debris
abilities.effect: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

abilities.name: Trace

abilities.name: Unaware

abilities.name: Unnerve

abilities.name: Unseen Fist
abilities.effect: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.

abilities.name: Volt Absorb
abilities.effect: Turns electricity into HP.

abilities.name: Wandering Spirit

abilities.name: Water Absorb
abilities.effect: Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move.

abilities.name: Water Bubble

abilities.name: Weak Armor
abilities.effect: Physical attacks lower Defense and raise Speed.
